data.content: Implementation review: REJECTED. Violations: (1) build-runtime-artifact.sh still copies PROMPT.md to runtime — violates 'stop shipping prompt template assets in runtime packaging'. (2) setup.sh _prompt_guidance_wizard and PROMPT.md references not cleaned. (3) ~840 lines of unrelated rollback/step-failure tests deleted — execution-backend-rollback.test.ts, terminal-manager-step-failure-rollback.test.ts, pre-dispatch rollback edge cases, and rollbackBeatState edge cases are NOT prompt-guidance tests and must be preserved. (4) doctor.ts comment at line 876 introduces new prompt-guidance reference (swapped stale-parent example for prompt-guidance). (5) Unused imports added to 3 doctor test files. Quality gates pass but scope drift is severe — the implementation must be limited to prompt-guidance removal only.
